Cooking_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "2AA3B3034DED0AC9FBF407A61A59D9EA", "The Grill and other similar Facilities allow you to cook and prepare meals and other items which can affect Maeve's Vitality. Interact with the Grill and click the Cooking button in the Info Panel to bring up the Cooking Panel. Recipes for items available for Cooking are shown, along with their required ingredients. You can Pin a Recipe to the left side of the screen with (RMB) in order to keep track of the required ingredients. Click the Recipe you'd like to prepare to start the process. Click multiple times to add items to the Queue. Items you have available for use as ingredients are shown in the right-hand Inventory panel. Ingredients will be automatically taken from your Inventory when a recipe is added to the queue. Items prepared via Cooking will be placed in the Inventory of the Grill.")
